title: EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE - 211info
text: LIFEWAYS INC EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides rapid identification, support, assessment and treatment for teenagers and young adults who are experiencing early signs of psychosis. Services include education about psychosis; medication along with medication monitoring; individual and group counseling; multi-family groups; occupational therapy; family education and support; vocational training and life-skills coaching; 24/7 crisis services; connections to community resources. 702 Sunset Drive Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: Ages 12-30 who have had a first episode of psychosis within the last 12 months or who are experiencing early at-risk symptoms for psychosis and their families Hours: Monday-Wednesday 8am-6pm, Thursday and Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 889-9167 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 889-9167 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake FEES: Accepts OHP and private insurance. Sliding scale fees available for uninsured patients DOCUMENTS: Insurance information if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Malheur County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm, Friday 8am-5pm Services: Early Intervention for Mental Illness Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - PEER SUPPORT CENTER MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - COMMUNITY SUPPORT SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - TREASURE VALLEY REGION MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - PREVENTION AND RECOVERY TREATMENT SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIFEWAYS INC
